commit_scope: Add a source-classified native mutation side-effect ledger that separates Python parity from reversible gate receipts and names missing audit-ledger parity.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_side_effect_ledger.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_native_mutation_side_effects_form.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_side_effect_binding.py tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py

python3 scripts/validate_spec_quality.py --file specs/native-mutation-side-effect-ledger.md --file specs/native-mutation-side-effects.md --file specs/native-mutation-route-side-effect-binding.md --file specs/native-mutation-public-gate.md --file specs/ideas-router-form-expression.md --file specs/spec-registry-source-native.md
local_validation.summary: Added native-mutation-side-effect-ledger.form as a keep/delete map for mutable companions. The ledger classifies graph writes as primary mutation, parent-edge repair/spec edge cleanup/cache invalidation/contributor-key audit as Python parity effects, rollback receipts as reversible gate receipts, idea valuation audit-ledger writes as missing Python parity, and resonance reattunement as not carried. Route forms and mutation specs now state that side-effect proof does not justify side effects and that ordinary no-header mutation traffic remains blocked until the deployed public gate canary and missing audit-ledger parity are resolved. The local PR guard passed against the stacked base origin/codex/native-mutation-public-gate-20260608 with ready_for_push=True.

known_limitations.observed: No ordinary no-header POST/PATCH/DELETE mutation traffic moved. No-header traffic still fans out to FastAPI.
No new domain side effects were added. Rollback receipts are classified as reversible gate safety rather than Python parity.
Python update_idea and update_ideas_batch audit-ledger writes remain missing Form-native parity and are now an explicit blocker before any no-header flip.
No production application database writes were attempted.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of this stacked branch and GitHub checks on a draft PR.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted. Ordinary no-header public mutation traffic remains on FastAPI.

phase_gate.reason: The anti-circular ledger is complete; ordinary mutation traffic still waits for a deployed public-gate canary and Form-native or explicitly retired idea valuation audit-ledger parity.
